browser_plan.purpose: Resume the live finance note and preserve the invoice-lock hold after confirming the review-only diff
browser_plan.expected_signal: live finance note revised with the latest lock direction and review-only evidence

browser_plan.purpose: Attempt release and stop because committee approval is still pending for the resumed finance note
browser_plan.blocked_reason: committee approval is still pending for the resumed live finance diff-review note

review_rounds.feedback: Keep the review-only diff confirmation explicit, preserve the latest invoice-lock hold, and show the revision delta after resume.

transitions.notes: Reload the live finance packet and confirm the review-only diff instruction before any lock update resumes
Resume the live finance note and preserve the invoice-lock hold after confirming the review-only diff
